title: MC: PS3 Edition
description: Dummed down version of the PS4 Edition
body:
Wish you could still play legacy with the newest updates? Well, here it is!

Using legacy 4J, the game feels like its straight off your PS3! with gamma, controller support and more to come!

This modpack is a replacment to Minecraft: Java Legacy Edition

WARNING! LEGACY 4J CAN BE SEEN AS A HACK BY ANTICHEAT! USE IN SERVERS WITH CAUTION!

Get the Minecraft PS4 Edition Modpack today!: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-ps4-edition](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-ps4-edition)
